description: apiKey 失效 / 被运维清掉 → 401。BYO SDK 必须 fail-fast,不重试(对照 wire-protocol §B)

then.sdkExpectedAction: mark dispatcher as fatal; subsequent onMessage() must reject without claim; log ERROR with traceId; wait for container restart (K8s liveness will recycle); do NOT retry, do NOT exponential-backoff
sdkMustNot: retry 401 (auth errors cannot recover by retry)
swallow the error and continue accepting tasks
